name: Apple Tarte
recipeInstructions:
Cream together butter and 1/3 cup sugar. Add flour and press into a 10-inch springform pan to form crust.
In another bowl, cream together cream cheese, vanilla, 1/4 cup sugar, and egg. Spread over the crust.
Toss sugar, cinnamon, and apples in a plastic bag until well combined, then spread over the cream mixture.
Sprinkle almonds over the apples. Bake at 450°F for 10 minutes, then reduce heat to 375°F and bake an additional 40 minutes.
